purpose: Targeted follow-up on the promising run2 directional/PCA config, testing a tapered LayerNorm + SiLU MLP without residual connections.

benchmarks.previous_sweep: Grid: K=2, Dir=T, Topo=late (Seed 44, Var PCA)

notes: Run2 showed the no-residual LayerNorm + SiLU head improved OOT PR-AUC on the directional/PCA benchmark.
This run tests whether a tapered [256, 128] head improves over run2's [128, 128] head without expanding back to the over-parameterized run0 width.
Only the promising directional/PCA benchmark is re-run; this is not a full sweep.
